response.justification: While Maria possesses extensive software engineering experience at the Staff level and strong expertise in TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and system architecture, she falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. Her resume lacks mention of Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are core technologies for this role, making her a poor fit despite her recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with a strong focus on system architecture, TDD, and CI/CD.
Proficient in TypeScript and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), aligning with some of the core tech stack requirements.
Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators.
concerns: Lacks the strictly required 8+ years of experience developing and shipping production-grade AI-driven solutions.
No mention of Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
AI experience appears limited only to the most recent role, rather than a sustained career focus on data pipelines and LLM integrations.
